purpose: Define the minimum preflight checks a future v0.5 beta installer must satisfy on macOS, Linux, and Windows before installation can be considered operator-ready.

platforms.operator_readback: The installer can locate the stack lockfile, native verification commands, contract registry, operator CLI surface, and writable evidence store on macOS before any beta install proceeds.
The installer can locate the stack lockfile, native verification commands, contract registry, operator CLI surface, and writable evidence store on Linux before any beta install proceeds.
The installer can locate the stack lockfile, native verification commands, contract registry, operator CLI surface, and writable evidence store on Windows before any beta install proceeds.
